creator: dillon@best.net
text:
libalias is seriously flawed.  There appears to be no bounds checking
    in /usr/src/lib/libalias/alias_nbt.c at all.

    I will attempt to fix the massive problems with this module, but it
    involves massive additions to the bounds checking code.

							-Matt

    Matthew Dillon  Engineering, HiWay Technologies, Inc. & BEST Internet
                    Communications.
    <dillon@best.net> (Please include portions of article in any response)
